creator: sales@hardiman-e-worldwide.com
text:
error received:
"/usr/libexec/ld-elf.so.1: Shared object 'libg-wrap-runtime-guile.so.2' not found

Where is this file supposed to be? it isn't in any of the packages that are downloaded as "dependencies". I have downloaded almost every package available through "stand/sysinstall" (all 11GB worth) and I have been unable to find it anywhere.

How-To-Repeat: Install FreeBSD 4.4-RELEASE w/ Gnome 1.4 then download GNUCASH through stand/sysinstall from Australian FTP Server (ftp.au.freebsd.org).
